items.headline: New mixed-use housing development approved for East Middlefield Road
items.summary: Mountain View approved a mixed-use residential development at 490 East Middlefield Road on the second reading, moving the project forward. This development will add housing to an area currently underutilized for residential use.

items.headline: Mountain View seeks state funding to accelerate housing production
items.summary: The city applied for Round 4 of California's Prohousing Incentive Program, a state grant that provides funding to cities that adopt policies to speed up housing development. If awarded, this could bring resources to help Mountain View build more homes faster.

items.headline: City seeking public input on $2026-27 housing grants plan
items.summary: Santa Clara is opening comment on how it will spend federal HUD housing grants for the next fiscal year. This is a chance for residents to weigh in on affordable housing priorities before the plan is finalized.

items.headline: City hosting community meeting on safe parking program
items.summary: Sunnyvale held a public meeting on Monday, March 23 to discuss a safe parking program. This appears to be a new or expanded initiative to address vehicle dwelling, though specific details about the program weren't included in the notice.
